name: OurSpace Short-Path Windows Build
requirementsImplemented: page 9 store with cart inside each HTML
task and store import/export JSON buttons
draggable collapsing nav with Eastern time and currency
shared currency 10 copper=1 silver, 10 silver=1 gold, 10 gold=1 platinum
MySpace layout color overrides preserve page backgrounds
latestPatch: Added game manifest/reward-rule dropdown population and DBT JSON catalog rendering into both profile HTML pages.
pathPolicy: Short internal paths. Root folder: os_site. Assets: a/. Data: assets/json/. Docs: doc/.
